description_long: This is a black Viking-style helmet with two prominent, curved white horns extending from either side. The helmet's surface is smooth with subtle textural details and faint scratches, suggesting a worn, battle-ready appearance. The horns are attached with visible, slightly roughened bases that contrast with the sleekness of the helmet's dome. The crown of the helmet is rounded and slightly domed, with a central ridge running from front to back. The overall silhouette is bold and aggressive, evoking historical and fantasy themes. There are no visible decorative elements or insignia, and the helmet appears to be made primarily of a hard, glossy material, likely plastic or metal, with synthetic or resin horns.
description: A black Viking-style helmet with two large, curved white horns and a smooth, slightly domed crown. The helmet has a glossy finish and subtle surface scratches.
description_view_0: Front view showing both curved white horns and the smooth, rounded black crown.
description_view_1: Side/top view highlighting the length and sharpness of the right horn and the central ridge of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view with both horns visible, emphasizing the helmet's symmetrical shape and glossy surface.
description_view_3: Side/top view focusing on the left horn and the helmet's central ridge.
